## ♿ UX & Accessibility Checklist
- [ ] **Semantic HTML:** Used correct tags for the job.
- [ ] **Keyboard Nav:** Navigable via Tab/Enter keys.
- [ ] **ARIA Labels:** Added to icon-only buttons or interactive elements.
- [ ] **Color Contrast:** Checked for readability.
- [ ] **Focus States:** Visible focus indicators on all interactive elements.
- [ ] **Responsive:** Works well on different screen sizes.
